full_text:
Gongsun Teng 公孫滕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Teng (公孫滕). Learned from his teacher Zhao Da but were on distant terms. Gongsun Teng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
